headline: CEO  at Bishopp Outdoor Advertising
summary:
With a career rooted in marketing and advertising, my role as CEO at Bishopp Outdoor Advertising has been a journey of innovation and community engagement. Our mission, to enhance business growth through effective outdoor advertising, has driven us to become a preferred choice for a diverse range of clients. At the helm, my focus is on ensuring our offerings yield high reach and frequency, supporting ASX 100 companies and local businesses alike.

My passion extends to the skies as Director and Pilot at Fighter Pilot Adventure Flights, where we provide unparalleled flight experiences aboard classic World War Two aircraft which include the Spitfire and P51 Mustang. This unique position allows me to combine my love for aviation with my commitment to delivering exceptional experiences. Balancing the thrill of flight with impeccable safety records, our team strives to make each adventure a testament to the power of living one's passion.

experiences.company: Fighter Pilot Adventure Flights Pty Ltd
experiences.title: Director and Pilot
experiences.description: Brad is a Director and Pilot of Australia’s premier adventure flight company, Fighter Pilot Adventure Flights. Being an avid collector and preserver of classic World War Two fighter planes (including the P51 Mustang, North American AT6 Harvard and the Russian YAK3-U), Brad lives his passion for flying and adventure. Established by four warbird enthusiasts who wanted to share the dream, Fighter Pilot offers once-in-a-lifetime flight experiences to adventurers and thrill-seekers alike. Our mission is to provide the ultimate sky-high experience to enthusiasts and adventure-seekers alike. Our goal of ensuring you have an experience of a lifetime is second only to maintaining our 100% incident free safety record – providing the very best customer service in a safe, action-packed environment.

experiences.title: Board Member
experiences.description: The Outdoor Media Association (OMA) is the peak national industry body that represents most of Australia’s traditional and digital outdoor media display companies and production facilities, as well as some media display asset owners. To date the OMA has 32 members and operates nationally. Prior to July 2005, the Outdoor Media Association (OMA) traded as the Outdoor Advertising Association of Australia (OAAA). It was first incorporated in 1939.

education.school: Marist Brothers Ashgrove and Indooroopilly State High
